user.title: Gate Portal
user.description: Set up the Gate Portal API for guest access to selected devices.

init.title: Gate Portal Settings
init.description: Configure which devices guests can control, the access PIN, and portal availability.

data_description.entities: Entities guests are allowed to control through the portal.
data_description.pin: Leave blank to keep the current PIN. Minimum 4 characters when changing.
data_description.enabled: When disabled, the portal API returns unavailable.
data_description.cors_origins: Frontend URLs allowed to call the API from a browser (e.g. https://portal.example.com).

error.entities_required: At least one entity is required when the portal is enabled.
error.pin_required: A PIN is required when setting up the portal.
error.pin_too_short: PIN must be at least 4 characters.
error.pin_unchanged_required: Set a PIN before enabling the portal.
